mapper.select: SELECT id, username, email, password, display_name, avatar_url, bio, enabled, created_at, updated_at FROM users WHERE username = #{username} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, username, email, password, display_name, avatar_url, bio, enabled, created_at, updated_at FROM users WHERE email = #{email} LIMIT 1
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM users WHERE username = #{username})
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM users WHERE email = #{email})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users(username, email, password, display_name, avatar_url, bio, enabled, created_at, updated_at) VALUES(#{username}, #{email}, #{password}, #{displayName}, #{avatarUrl}, #{bio}, #{enabled}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.name, r.description FROM roles r JOIN user_roles ur ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId}
